Dataset Name: Affective Norms for 718 Polish Short Texts
Description: This dataset provides standardized ratings for 718 Polish short texts (sentences, phrases) across multiple affective and psycholinguistic dimensions, including valence, arousal, dominance, origin, and subjective significance. It is designed to serve as standardized stimulus material for emotional, cognitive, and psycholinguistic experiments using Polish text materials.

Tasks: Sentiment Analysis, Text Classification, Emotion Classification, Affective Computing
Description: A sentiment analysis dataset of Polish product reviews extracted from the e-commerce marketplace Allegro.pl, with ratings on a 1-5 scale.
Notes: The citing paper cannot be accessed due to copyright restrictions.

Description: A revised dataset of affective norms for Polish words providing emotional ratings across multiple dimensions.

Tasks: Hate Speech Classification, Offensive Language Detection
Description: A Polish language dataset of banned offensive posts and comments from the Wykop.pl social media service, labeled as harmful or neutral.

Tasks: Historical Linguistics, Text Classification, Language Modeling, Syntactic Analysis
Description: A large, morphosyntactically annotated historical corpus of Polish texts from the 17th and 18th centuries (up to 1772), comprising approximately 13.5 million segments.

Tasks: Information Retrieval, Question Answering, Text Classification, Semantic Similarity
Description: a new benchmark which comprises 13 datasets, facilitating further development, training and evaluation of modern Polish language models for IR tasks.

Dataset Name: Creative Commons from Common Crawl Corpus
Tasks: Language Modeling, Word Embeddings, Semantic Similarity, Information Retrieval
Description: A multilingual web-scale corpus extracted from Common Crawl consisting of Creative Commons licensed documents.
Notes: The cited paper introduces the C4Corpus dataset but does not provide a direct dataset download URL; it describes tools and procedures to reconstruct the corpus from Common Crawl. The citing paper does not mention or use the C4Corpus dataset.

Tasks: Text Classification, Hate Speech Classification, Toxicity Detection
Description: A curated online catalogue of datasets related to abusive and hateful language research.
A dataset of Polish Twitter messages annotated for harmful content, including cyberbullying and hate speech, released for the PolEval 2019 Shared Task on automatic cyberbullying detection.
Notes: The originally provided cited paper was incorrect; the correct cited paper for the CBD set was identified from the citing paperˇŻs reference. The cited paper provides links to the task repository, while the dataset itself may be distributed through task organizers.

Tasks: Semantic Similarity, Compositional Semantics Modeling, Textual Entailment, Natural Language Understanding
Description: A corpus of sentence pairs annotated for semantic relatedness and textual entailment to evaluate compositional distributional semantics models.

Tasks: Question Answering, Information Retrieval, Text Classification, Language Modeling
Description: A Polish question-answering dataset containing questions from the ˇ°Did you know?ˇ± section of Polish Wikipedia linked to relevant articles.

Dataset Name: An English-Polish parallel corpus of TV dialogue
Tasks: Machine Translation, Information Extraction, Compositional Semantics Modeling, Natural Language Understanding
Description: A major release of the OpenSubtitles collection of parallel corpora, compiled from a large database of movie and TV subtitles.

Tasks: Question Answering, Reading Comprehension, Information Retrieval
Description: an open-domain question answering evaluation set comprising 10k question-answer pairs aligned across 26 typologically diverse languages
Notes: This paper uses MKQA (Polish portion), not the original Natural Questions dataset. Natural Questions is only the upstream English source from which MKQA was constructed.

Tasks: Text Classification, Sentiment Analysis, Hate Speech Classification, Information Extraction
Description: A corpus of Polish online forum posts annotated for offensive content and hate speech detection.
A large-scale corpus of Polish text (1.35 billion tokens) compiled from diverse web sources and used for training word embeddings.
A comprehensive multi-task benchmark for evaluating Polish language understanding, consisting of nine diverse tasks such as sentiment analysis, named entity recognition, and question answering.
